Mtn For Evidentiary , Issue And/Or Sanctions
Off Calendar Dec-16-2013 Text Ruling
MINI MINUTES:

No appearance, the court vacated its tentative ruling and ruled as follows:
DEFENDANT MERCEDES BENZ USA, LLC'S Motion For Evidentiary , Issue And/Or Sanctions is taken off-calendar per stipulation of the parties. Pro Tem Judge: Robert Kane; Clerk: Cynthia Herbert, Not reported. =302/jpt

Mtn For Evidentiary , Issue And/Or Sanctions
Off Calendar Dec-06-2013 Continued To Dec-16-13 At 09:00 A.M. In Dept 302
MINI MINUTES:
No appearance, tentative ruling is adopted. DEFENDANT MERCEDES BENZ USA, LLC's Motion For Evidentiary , Issue And/Or Sanctions is continued to December 16, 2013 to give Mercedes Benz USA, LLC the opportunity to comply with Local Rule 2.6B. Mercedes Benz USA, LLC must deliver courtesy copies of the opposition papers to Department 302, with a cover letter stating the new hearing date, no later than December 6, 2013 at 4:00 pm or the motion will be denied. Any exhibit must be separated by an exhibit tab per CRC 3.1110(f). The court has courtesy copies of the opposition papers. Judge Pro Tem: Geoffrey Howard; Clerk: Gina Gonzales; Not reported.

CASE MANAGEMENT CONFERENCE
Off Calendar Jun-20-2013 Set For Trial On Jan-27-14 At 09:30 A.M. In Dept 206
